summary: Completed testing of Silent Honor Foundation website - backend APIs working, frontend routing issues identified

integration_issues.issue: Static file server (serve) not properly handling HTML page routes without .html extension
integration_issues.details: The serve package is serving index.html for all routes that don't have corresponding files, preventing access to login.html, signup.html, etc.

passed_tests: Admin /me endpoint returns correct user data
Homepage loads with navigation and hero section
Service cards display correctly (6 cards found)
Donate button links to correct Zeffy URL
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend routing issue: The static file server (serve package) needs to be configured to properly serve HTML pages without .html extension. Currently login.html, signup.html, admin.html, dashboard.html, and contact.html are not accessible via their clean URLs (/login, /signup, /admin, /dashboard, /contact). This prevents testing of login functionality, member registration flow, and admin dashboard access.

success_percentage.frontend: 25% (4/16 expected features tested due to routing issues)
